3324260.name: Shepherd's Plan
3324260.description:
Shepherd’s Plan is a narrative-driven noir but colorful fantasy story set in the 1950s vibe featuring fabled characters with a point-and-click system but also full of dark humor about working life and the suffering of the working class made in RPG Maker MV and released in the 2024 April Fool's Day. 

Story

“Ruin the company and all of the money will be yours.”

“Sound like a great deal right?”

"Shera," a graphic designer employed at a well-known newspaper publishing company, is forced to resign and see her goals and future collapse. However, a mysterious entity presents her with a unique opportunity to destroy the company, and her misfortune becomes a new opportunity. Would Shera accept this offer? Who would be that insane to do that, right?

KEY FEATURES:

  • Suffering story with a dark humor of the working class based on real life.

  • ‘Unexpectable’ gameplay of everyday office life.

  • It's a plan of sweet revenge on 5+ characters. (Especially, your boss.)

  • More than colorful 20+ illustrations.

  • Turn your office upside down to find lots of clues.

  • When you play this game, your boss and colleague won't know you are cursing them.

  • Jazz soundtrack to relax during working hours.

  • Translation in Thai (This one is a lie, the game is in Thai but then got translated into English.)

Well, it’s time to stop reading! Clock in, we got revenge to work on today.
